description: Master paper database for the research hub. Each paper uses a placeholder citation structure plus label-based topic tags. A single paper can belong to multiple high/mid/low tag paths.
notes: Citation format is temporary and can be replaced later with CSL-JSON, BibTeX-derived JSON, DOI metadata, or any citation format you choose.
topicTags are label-driven so the panel can show readable tags instead of generic IDs.
A paper may include multiple tag paths if it belongs to multiple topic areas.

citation.title: Placeholder Paper on LPCVD Growth of β-Ga₂O₃

papers.summary: Placeholder summary for a paper focused on LPCVD growth behavior and epitaxial film quality.
papers.flatTags: Epitaxial Growth > Growth Systems > LPCVD; Epitaxial Growth > Characterization > XRD; Epitaxial Growth > Characterization > AFM
